title: Organizational Membership
description: Domestic Organizational Membership is $68 for one year or
text:
Domestic Organizational Membership is $68 for one year or $182 for three years; International Organizational Membership is $99 for one year or $256 for three years, which covers the cost of international mail. Organizational Membership is purely a subscription to Proceedings, as all other membership benefits do not apply.
If you are an organization, such as a library or subscription agency, and would like to receive Proceedings and/or Naval History magazine, please contact our Member Services Department at circulation@usni.org with subject line "Organizational Membership" for subscription pricing information.
